title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCXCV. Lullabies.
content:
Ride, baby, ride,
                Pretty baby shall ride,
        And have a little puppy-dog tied to her side,
        And little pussy-cat tied to the other,
        And away she shall ride to see her grandmother,
                To see her grandmother,
                To see her grandmother.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. CCCXCV. Lullabies."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
